name: Potato Tatin with Brie and Prosciutto
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:35
Heat butter in a pan over medium heat. Add shallots and sauté until softened.
Add white wine and reduce by half. Stir in cream, potatoes, garlic, bouquet garni, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
Cook the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Place several potato slices into the bottom of six 3-inch molds in a circular petal formation.
Layer with prosciutto, Brie, and remaining potatoes.
Cover with puff pastry. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for 20-25 minutes until potatoes are tender and pastry is golden brown.
Turn the Tatin out onto plates and garnish as desired.
